title: BEM-897 report packaging
objective:
Run script:
"""
Path('governance/cycles').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/tools').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/reports').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch').mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

cycle_id = 'CYCLE-BEM897-001'
proofs = [
 'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM890_DISPATCH_CONTOUR_PASS.md',
 'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM891_WORKER_INBOX_DELIVERY_PASS.md',
 'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM892_CONTOUR_PROCESSING_PASS.md',
 'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM893_E2E_DISPATCH_SELFTEST_PASS.md',
 'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM894_SENDING_CONTOUR_READY.md',
 'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM895_AUTONOMOUS_LOOP_PASS.md',
 'governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM896_POLICY_GATE_PASS.md'
]
missing = [p for p in proofs if not Path(p).exists()]
package = {
  'cycle_id':cycle_id,
  'status':'PASS' if not missing else 'FAIL',
  'scope':'sending contour plus autonomous loop proof package',
  'proofs':proofs,
  'missing':missing,
  'created_at_utc3':'2026-05-30T07:00:00+03:00'
}
Path('governance/cycles/' + cycle_id + '.json').write_text(json.dumps(package, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')
md = '# ' + cycle_id + '\n\nStatus: ' + package['status'] + '\n\nScope: ' + package['scope'] + '\n\nProofs:\n'
for p in proofs:
    md += '- ' + p + '\n'
md += '\nMissing: ' + (', '.join(missing) if missing else 'none') + '\n'
Path('governance/cycles/' + cycle_id + '.md').write_text(md, encoding='utf-8')

tool = '''# BEM-897 cycle report packager
import json
from pathlib import Path
cycle_id = "CYCLE-BEM897-001"
package = json.loads(Path("governance/cycles/" + cycle_id + ".json").read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
missing = [p for p in package.get("proofs", []) if not Path(p).exists()]
print("PASS" if not missing else "FAIL")
for p in missing:
    print("missing " + p)
raise SystemExit(0 if not missing else 1)
'''
Path('governance/tools/package_cycle_report.py').write_text(tool, encoding='utf-8')
status = package['status']
Path('governance/reports/BEM897_REPORT_PACKAGING.md').write_text('# BEM-897 Report packaging\n\nStatus: ' + status + '\n\nCycle package: governance/cycles/' + cycle_id + '.md\n\nMissing: ' + (', '.join(missing) if missing else 'none') + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM897_REPORT_PACKAGING_' + status + '.md')
marker.write_text('# BEM-897 report packaging proof\nStatus: ' + status + '\nCycle: ' + cycle_id + '\nMissing: ' + (', '.join(missing) if missing else 'none') + '\n', encoding='utf-8')

backlog = Path('governance/autonomy/NEXT_EXECUTABLE_BACKLOG.json')
if backlog.exists():
    b = json.loads(backlog.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
    for item in b.get('items', []):
        if item.get('id') == 'BEM-897-001':
            item['status'] = 'completed'
            item['proof'] = str(marker)
        elif 'status' not in item:
            item['status'] = 'pending'
    backlog.write_text(json.dumps(b, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2), encoding='utf-8')

changed_files.extend(['governance/cycles/' + cycle_id + '.json','governance/cycles/' + cycle_id + '.md','governance/tools/package_cycle_report.py','governance/reports/BEM897_REPORT_PACKAGING.md',str(marker),'governance/autonomy/NEXT_EXECUTABLE_BACKLOG.json'])
ops_applied.append('BEM897 report packaging ' + status)
"""
No issue comments.
